p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 5 pass_to_pass repo_tests from CI/CD discovery: 1) test_mime_package_tests (pnpm --filter @remix-run/mime test), 2) test_mime_package_typecheck (pnpm --filter @remix-run/mime typecheck), 3) test_response_package_tests (pnpm --filter @remix-run/response test), 4) test_response_package_typecheck (pnpm --filter @remix-run/response typecheck), 5) test_changes_validate (pnpm changes:validate). All verified to pass on base commit 848194ec. Excluded: full pnpm test (has failures in interaction/headers packages), pnpm build (not required), pnpm lint (not required).

validate.notes: Docker build successful. NOP test passes with reward=0 (7 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base commit). Gold test passes with reward=1 (13/13 tests pass after fix). Fixed solve.sh to update packages/response/src/lib/file.test.ts to expect charset in Content-Type header (text/plain, text/html now include '; charset=utf-8'). Rubric judge requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY which is unavailable in this environment - functional tests all pass.
